claim: In B cell progenitors, Pax5 specifies B cell identity and mediates lineage commitment.
question: Does Pax5 specify B cell identity and mediate lineage commitment in B cell progenitors?

claim: Pax5 represses lineage-inappropriate genes in pro-B cells.
question: Does Pax5 repress lineage-inappropriate genes in pro-B cells?

claim: In Pax5−/− pro-B cells, expression of a constitutively deacetylated Pax5 K198R mutant abrogated T cell potential.
question: Does expression of the constitutively deacetylated Pax5 K198R mutant in Pax5-deficient pro-B cells abrogate T cell potential?
